name: Double the Die & Pinky
description:
How to make more chats?… Oh yeah. CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING. BUT WHO WILL SIT ON YOUR FACE?

Sorry for the delay, it just that I didn’t want to focus on JanitorAI and focus on other things. Anyway, last day of the Deviant Cross event. Bonus bots may come out next week, but it’s unknown. Keep in mind that one bonus bot will have a returning character (hint: The fans love her since 2024).

Also wanna say this, but I won’t be making any Roblox bots till next month, probably cause of the recent incident. So, I’mma keep a distance from Roblox😬 This also means that I’ll reject any suggestions that are Roblox-related, and will finish those next month. Consider this and the bonus bots the last day of Roblox bots, from me… Now, you can go find some other creators who took inspiration from me or nah.

“But who, GRIMKid? Your Roblox bots are better than the others. Plus, you’re the pioneer of Roblox facesitting.” Let me give you a list of users that does Roblox (+facesitting) bots, all underground users btw:

nixtrq

Raizerkun (CW: AVOID THE FARTS BOTS!!!)

Cumslut Adrian

Oreo (CW: AVOID THE VORE BOTS!!!)

RoblocksGuyOrSomethingIDontKnowAnymore

Focussedblocl

To the yappin?…. Hell nah,

Credits:

Double the Die: OC & PIC BY MXQVOOP

Pinky: PICS BY LAMENTLIFE, WHILE OC OWNED BY AN UNKNOWN
